meta.granularity: directory/module; file-level only where a file merits individual comment

entry.desc: virtual workspace manifest: members, shared package fields, build profiles (deps + RT crates optimized in dev)
exact stable pin (1.95.0), components, cross-check targets
cargo-deny license allowlist - enforces the GPL-free dependency standard
CI: lint (fmt+clippy), test (windows), cross-compile checks (linux/mac/wasm), license audit
project documents: rationale (revision.md), requirements v1, PoC plan, getting-started, coding standard, boot-02 proposal, plan JSON + HTML dashboard, this file map
rev-core: pure model - event, phrase, instance, track, tempo map, tuning, commands; degree-native, 5040 ppq; WASM-able (R-104)
rev-engine: RT audio - cpal duplex, engine-owned clock, scheduler, graph runtime (Web Audio semantics), zero-alloc callback
rev-store: SQLite store-primary persistence - journal (only write path), snapshots, TMON crash-safety
rev-midi: midir wrapper - enumeration, driver-boundary timestamps, thru fast path, live/capture fork
rev-ui-mech: mechanism layer - winit/wgpu/cosmic-text, input routing, hands-off clause (R-907); no Win32 outside this crate
rev-ui-kit: control-skin widget kit (R-712), built against the mechanism contract only
rev-app: composition root binary - wiring, command dispatch, view state; no musical logic in any frontend
